Configure: This invoice was created in accordance with the general terms and conditions of %1 and Mondu GmbH for the instalment payment model.

Configure: Before the amounts are debited from your account, you will receive notice regarding the direct debit. Kindly make sure you have sufficient funds in your account. In the event of changes to your order, the instalment plan will be adjusted to reflect the new order total.
